title: [impl] BLE GATT queue time-based expiry
description:
Add deadline-based expiry to the BLE GATT FromRadio queue per spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md §2.

Current state:
- Queue entries are `Vec<u8, MAX_MESSAGE_SIZE>` with no deadline field
- No timestamp mechanism available

Required:
1. Add a deadline_ms field to queued entries (or wrap in a struct)
2. Record entry time when queueing (requires timestamp source)
3. On dequeue/peek, check if entry is expired; drop silently if so
4. Default deadline: 60s per policy (application data)

Considerations:
- Need portable timestamp source (embassy-time::Instant, or abstract trait)
- BLE GATT service is currently platform-agnostic; time source may need to be injected
